2606.30111.title: Automating the Design of Embodied AgentArchitectures
2606.30111.paper_summary: Embodied agents are typically built as hand-designed compositions of perception, memory, planning, and action modules. This modularity exposes a large architectural design space, but current systems still rely on researcher intuition to choose where information is stored, how observations are processed, and how model calls are connected. Agent Architecture Search (AAS) automates such design for text-domain agents, but has not been systematically evaluated on perceptual embodied agents through simulator rollouts. We study this transfer. We introduce AgentCanvas, a typed-graph runtime that hosts embodied executors as editable node-and-wire programs with simulator-aware execution and episode-level logs, and KDLoop, a coding-agent search procedure that cycles through proposal, critique, experiment, and distillation, with triggered reflection after stalls. We evaluate three AAS variants across four embodied executors spanning vision-language navigation, embodied question answering, and language-conditioned manipulation. The resulting 3x4 matrix shows that architecture-level search can produce deployable and directional success-rate gains on embodied tasks, while one apparent high-scoring candidate is rejected as leak-bearing. At the same time, the experiments expose constraints that are muted in text-domain AAS: optimization signals can be masked by rollout noise, search can become trapped in local edit basins, and episode-level credit assignment only partially emerges even when detailed logs are available. These results characterize both the promise and the current limits of automated architecture search for embodied agents.
2606.30111.paper_summary_zh: 具身代理通常被構建為手工設計的感知、記憶、計劃和行動模組的組合。這種模組化暴露了大量的架構設計空間，但當前系統仍然依賴研究者的直覺來選擇信息的存儲位置、觀察的處理方式以及模型調用的連接方式。代理架構搜尋（AAS）自動化了文本領域代理的設計，但尚未通過模擬器的回合系統對感知具身代理進行系統評估。我們研究這種轉移。我們介紹了AgentCanvas，一個類型化圖形運行時，承載具身執行器作為可編輯的節點和連接程序，具有模擬器感知的執行和回合級日誌，以及KDLoop，一個編碼代理搜尋程序，循環進行提案、批評、實驗和提煉，在停滯後觸發反思。我們在四個涵蓋視覺-語言導航、具身問答和語言條件操控的具身執行器上評估了三個AAS變體。結果的3x4矩陣顯示，架構級搜尋可以在具身任務上產生可部署和有方向的成功率增益，而一個明顯高分的候選者則被拒絕為帶漏的。同時，實驗揭示了在文本領域AAS中被抑制的限制：優化信號可能會被回合噪音掩蓋，搜尋可能會陷入局部編輯盆地，即使在詳細日誌可用的情況下，回合級的信用分配也僅部分出現。這些結果描述了自動化架構搜尋對於具身代理的潛力和當前限制。
2606.30111.author: Jian Zhou et.al.
2606.30111.authors: Jian Zhou, Sihao Lin, Jin Li, Shuai Fu, Gengze Zhou, Qi Wu
